title: Heroes of Yesteryear
description: a mod addes demon etrigans power from dc comics
body:
❓ What is Heroes of Yesteryear?

Heroes of Yesteryear is a Super Hero themed Addon/Mod for ThreeTAG's Palladium mod.

📃 Everything You Should Know Is In:
**[Wiki](https://trello.com/b/G0aLK7XH/heroes-of-yesteryear)**


[Atrox](https://www.curseforge.com/members/atrox/projects)--> Etrigan Skin/Model Creator

[Dreyse](https://www.curseforge.com/members/akumadreyse/projects)--> Spin Ability Kube Js Code

[Owen--> Multimotion](https://www.curseforge.com/members/shadowlegacy557/projects)

[Fsang: Scan, Projectile Offset](https://www.curseforge.com/members/fsang18/projects)

Spring--> Explosion

FoxyDucky--> Pentagram

[Mr_Fuu--> Tell Raw ](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mr_fu318/projects)

WolfDude24-->Random Scoreboard


You need This mods:

Palladium
Architectury API (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge)
GeckoLib
KubeJS
Rhino
Pehkui
 

Warning: Do not re-upload, steal, or copy anything.

You can use this mod on in your minecraft server you want but let me know.
